subject: Saturday watercolor class — head count
snippet: Morning Maria — looks like a full room for Saturday...
body:
Morning Maria,

Looks like a full room for the Saturday 2pm watercolor class at the Arts Center. I count 14 registered so far, two new students asked to join from the spring open house.

Want me to set out extra easels and pull more of the cold-press paper from the supply closet?

See you Saturday.

Carla

subject: Tuesday class — can we shift a week?
snippet: Maria, I'm traveling Tuesday for a design deadline...
body:
Maria,

I'm slammed with a design deadline next Tuesday and won't make the private painting class. Any chance we push to Wednesday, or should I just catch the next one?

I've cc'd Emily since she asked about the loose-floral demo too.

Thanks as always,
Rachel

subject: Re: Saturday watercolor class — head count
snippet: Extra easels would be a help...
body:
Extra easels would be a help, thank you Carla.

Let's start the new students on a flat wash before we get anywhere near florals. No rushing the layers.

See you at 1:30 to set up.

Maria

subject: Church board — July agenda and the newsletter
snippet: Good meeting Sunday on the outreach budget...
body:
Maria,

Good board meeting Sunday — the outreach budget discussion was productive, thank you for steering it.

For July a few of us want to revisit the free dental screening day you proposed. Whenever you finish your note for the monthly newsletter, send it over and I'll fold it in.

Warmly,
Pastor Keith

subject: You have been selected for an exclusive reward
snippet: Congratulations! You have been pre-approved...
body:
Dear Valued Member,

Congratulations! You have been pre-approved for an exclusive reward. Click below within 24 hours to claim your prize before it expires...

Best,
The Rewards Team

subject: Sunday lunch and wedding dress fitting
snippet: Hi Maria — are you free Sunday after church for lunch at Mom and Dad's?...
body:
Hi Maria,

Are you free Sunday after church for lunch at Mom and Dad's? Karim's on call so it'll just be us.

Also — maid of honor duties! Can we lock the dress fitting before the fall wedding? Saturdays are tight with your clinic, I know. Pick a weekend and I'll work around it.

Love,
Nicole

subject: AAPD sedation practicum — fall registration
snippet: Quick note confirming I'm registering for the fall practicum.
body:
Robert,

Confirming I'll register for the AAPD sedation practicum this fall — targeting the certification I've been working toward. Could you point me to the prerequisite module list so I can knock those out over the summer?

Rachel's considering it too; cc'ing her here.

Maria

subject: Re: Church board — July agenda and the newsletter
snippet: I'll have my note to you by Friday...
body:
Pastor Keith,

The outreach budget came together better than I expected — glad we held the line on the food pantry line item.

I'll have my newsletter note ready by Friday. On the free dental screening day: I can donate a Saturday in late summer and bring two of my hygienists if the church handles sign-ups. Let's put it on the July agenda.

Warmly,
Maria

subject: Brushes from the Vermont maker arrived
snippet: The handmade brushes came in for the class...
body:
Maria,

The handmade brushes from the Vermont maker arrived — I split the order so the class can try them before committing. The pointed round holds a beautiful tip.

I set yours aside. If the students take to them I'll put in a bigger order through the Etsy shop.

Emily

subject: Summer art fair — instructor booth schedule
snippet: Thank you for signing up to demo at the fair...
body:
Hello Maria,

Thank you for signing up to demo at the Dearborn summer art fair. You're down for the Saturday morning watercolor demo and the Sunday student showcase table.

Framing for the showcase pieces is in the annex — let us know how many slots your students will need. Coffee provided.

Dearborn Community Arts Center

subject: Sunday lunch — what should I make?
snippet: Looking forward to having everyone Sunday...
body:
Hi Maria,

Looking forward to having you all Sunday after church. Your father wants to do carnitas — anything you'd like me to add for you and Nicole?

Bring that watercolor you said you finished; your dad wants to see it before you give it away.

Love,
Mom

subject: Re: Sunday lunch — what should I make?
snippet: Carnitas sounds perfect — count me in...
body:
Hi Mom,

Carnitas sounds perfect. I'll bring a salad and the watercolor — it's the one of the dunes at Sleeping Bear, framed and ready for the commission, so no fingerprints on it please (looking at Dad).

Nicole and I will come straight from church. Save us seats.

Love,
Maria

subject: Friday dinner — same place?
snippet: Al-Ameer at 7 work for you again?...
body:
Maria,

Al-Ameer at 7 work for you again Friday? Dan's got the kids, so it's just us and I have a whole saga about a green-card case to unload on you.

Lisa

subject: Summer studio sale — watercolor papers and pans
snippet: Save on cold-press blocks and Daniel Smith sets...
body:
Dear Customer,

Our summer studio sale is here. This month: cold-press watercolor blocks, Daniel Smith half-pan sets, and a fresh batch of natural-hair rounds.

Happy painting,
Blick Art Materials

subject: Commission — anniversary piece
snippet: Wondering if you have room for one more commission...
body:
Maria,

Do you have room for one more commission before fall? It's a gift for my parents' 40th — their old house on the east side, from a photo. I know you're booked with the wedding and clinic, no pressure on timing.

Happy to come by Tuesday class to talk details.

Grace

subject: CE registration confirmed — pediatric sedation series
snippet: Your registration for the summer CE series is confirmed...
body:
Hello Maria,

Your registration for the summer pediatric sedation CE series is confirmed. Sessions run online Thursday evenings in July, with the in-person practicum scheduled for the fall.

Prerequisite modules unlock June 24. Certificate of completion follows the practicum.

AAPD Peers CE

subject: Urgent: verify your account within 24 hours
snippet: We detected unusual sign-in activity...
body:
Dear Customer,

We detected unusual sign-in activity on your account. To avoid suspension, verify your details within 24 hours by clicking the secure link below.

Account Security Team

subject: Newsletter draft — your board note
snippet: Got your note, thank you. One small edit...
body:
Maria,

Got your board note, thank you — clear as always. One small edit: could you add the dollar figure for the new fellowship-hall chairs? Pastor Keith wants it on the record before we vote.

I'll send the full draft tomorrow.

Diane

subject: Re: summer art fair — instructor booth schedule
snippet: Saturday demo and Sunday showcase both work...
body:
Hello,

Saturday morning demo and the Sunday student showcase both work for me. Please hold six framing slots — I have six students ready to exhibit.

I'll bring my own travel palette and water jars.

Maria

subject: Referral — pediatric patient from my office
snippet: Sending a young patient your way...
body:
Maria,

I'm referring a family your way — a four-year-old who needs a pediatric specialist for some early-childhood work that's beyond my comfort zone. Parents are anxious; I told them Bright Smiles is the gentlest chair in Dearborn.

I'll have my front desk send records once they sign the release.

Rachel

Warmly,
Pastor Keith

subject: You have been selected for an exclusive reward
snippet: Congratulations! You have been pre-approved...
body:
Dear Valued Member,

Congratulations! You have been pre-approved for an exclusive reward. Click below within 24 hours to claim your prize before it expires...

Best,
The Rewards Team

subject: Sunday lunch and wedding dress fitting
snippet: Hi Maria — are you free Sunday after church for lunch at Mom and Dad's?...
body:
Hi Maria,

Are you free Sunday after church for lunch at Mom and Dad's? Karim's on call so it'll just be us.

Also — maid of honor duties! Can we lock the dress fitting before the fall wedding? Saturdays are tight with your clinic, I know. Pick a weekend and I'll work around it.

Love,
Nicole

subject: AAPD sedation practicum — fall registration
snippet: Quick note confirming I'm registering for the fall practicum.
body:
Robert,

Confirming I'll register for the AAPD sedation practicum this fall — targeting the certification I've been working toward. Could you point me to the prerequisite module list so I can knock those out over the summer?

Rachel's considering it too; cc'ing her here.

Maria

subject: Re: Church board — July agenda and the newsletter
snippet: I'll have my note to you by Friday...
body:
Pastor Keith,

The outreach budget came together better than I expected — glad we held the line on the food pantry line item.

I'll have my newsletter note ready by Friday. On the free dental screening day: I can donate a Saturday in late summer and bring two of my hygienists if the church handles sign-ups. Let's put it on the July agenda.

Warmly,
Maria

subject: Brushes from the Vermont maker arrived
snippet: The handmade brushes came in for the class...
body:
Maria,

The handmade brushes from the Vermont maker arrived — I split the order so the class can try them before committing. The pointed round holds a beautiful tip.

I set yours aside. If the students take to them I'll put in a bigger order through the Etsy shop.

Emily

subject: Summer art fair — instructor booth schedule
snippet: Thank you for signing up to demo at the fair...
body:
Hello Maria,

Thank you for signing up to demo at the Dearborn summer art fair. You're down for the Saturday morning watercolor demo and the Sunday student showcase table.

Framing for the showcase pieces is in the annex — let us know how many slots your students will need. Coffee provided.

Dearborn Community Arts Center

subject: Sunday lunch — what should I make?
snippet: Looking forward to having everyone Sunday...
body:
Hi Maria,

Looking forward to having you all Sunday after church. Your father wants to do carnitas — anything you'd like me to add for you and Nicole?

Bring that watercolor you said you finished; your dad wants to see it before you give it away.

Love,
Mom

subject: Re: Sunday lunch — what should I make?
snippet: Carnitas sounds perfect — count me in...
body:
Hi Mom,

Carnitas sounds perfect. I'll bring a salad and the watercolor — it's the one of the dunes at Sleeping Bear, framed and ready for the commission, so no fingerprints on it please (looking at Dad).

Nicole and I will come straight from church. Save us seats.

Love,
Maria

subject: Friday dinner — same place?
snippet: Al-Ameer at 7 work for you again?...
body:
Maria,

Al-Ameer at 7 work for you again Friday? Dan's got the kids, so it's just us and I have a whole saga about a green-card case to unload on you.

Lisa

subject: Summer studio sale — watercolor papers and pans
snippet: Save on cold-press blocks and Daniel Smith sets...
body:
Dear Customer,

Our summer studio sale is here. This month: cold-press watercolor blocks, Daniel Smith half-pan sets, and a fresh batch of natural-hair rounds.

Happy painting,
Blick Art Materials

subject: Commission — anniversary piece
snippet: Wondering if you have room for one more commission...
body:
Maria,

Do you have room for one more commission before fall? It's a gift for my parents' 40th — their old house on the east side, from a photo. I know you're booked with the wedding and clinic, no pressure on timing.

Happy to come by Tuesday class to talk details.

Grace

subject: CE registration confirmed — pediatric sedation series
snippet: Your registration for the summer CE series is confirmed...
body:
Hello Maria,

Your registration for the summer pediatric sedation CE series is confirmed. Sessions run online Thursday evenings in July, with the in-person practicum scheduled for the fall.

Prerequisite modules unlock June 24. Certificate of completion follows the practicum.

AAPD Peers CE

subject: Urgent: verify your account within 24 hours
snippet: We detected unusual sign-in activity...
body:
Dear Customer,

We detected unusual sign-in activity on your account. To avoid suspension, verify your details within 24 hours by clicking the secure link below.

subject: Newsletter draft — your board note
snippet: Got your note, thank you. One small edit...
body:
Maria,

Got your board note, thank you — clear as always. One small edit: could you add the dollar figure for the new fellowship-hall chairs? Pastor Keith wants it on the record before we vote.

I'll send the full draft tomorrow.

Diane

subject: Re: summer art fair — instructor booth schedule
snippet: Saturday demo and Sunday showcase both work...
body:
Hello,

Saturday morning demo and the Sunday student showcase both work for me. Please hold six framing slots — I have six students ready to exhibit.

I'll bring my own travel palette and water jars.

Maria

subject: Referral — pediatric patient from my office
snippet: Sending a young patient your way...
body:
Maria,

I'm referring a family your way — a four-year-old who needs a pediatric specialist for some early-childhood work that's beyond my comfort zone. Parents are anxious; I told them Bright Smiles is the gentlest chair in Dearborn.

I'll have my front desk send records once they sign the release.

Rachel

subject: Saturday watercolor class — head count
snippet: Morning Maria — looks like a full room for Saturday...
body:
Morning Maria,

Looks like a full room for the Saturday 2pm watercolor class at the Arts Center. I count 14 registered so far, two new students asked to join from the spring open house.

Want me to set out extra easels and pull more of the cold-press paper from the supply closet?

See you Saturday.

Carla

subject: Tuesday class — can we shift a week?
snippet: Maria, I'm traveling Tuesday for a design deadline...
body:
Maria,

I'm slammed with a design deadline next Tuesday and won't make the private painting class. Any chance we push to Wednesday, or should I just catch the next one?

I've cc'd Emily since she asked about the loose-floral demo too.

Thanks as always,
Rachel

subject: Re: Saturday watercolor class — head count
snippet: Extra easels would be a help...
body:
Extra easels would be a help, thank you Carla.

Let's start the new students on a flat wash before we get anywhere near florals. No rushing the layers.

See you at 1:30 to set up.

Maria

subject: Church board — July agenda and the newsletter
snippet: Good meeting Sunday on the outreach budget...
body:
Maria,

Good board meeting Sunday — the outreach budget discussion was productive, thank you for steering it.

For July a few of us want to revisit the free dental screening day you proposed. Whenever you finish your note for the monthly newsletter, send it over and I'll fold it in.

subject: RSVP thread tally as of this morning
snippet: Running tally against your inbox RSVPs: 139 confirmed replies in the RSVP thread...
body:
Hi Maria,

Running tally against your inbox RSVPs for Nicole & Karim's wedding as of this morning: 139 confirmed replies in the Gmail RSVP thread. This will not match Nicole's master list exactly because a handful of confirms came in through the family group instead of email. Nicole's own master page is the one Lakeside Kitchen should trust for the final catering call.

Sara

subject: Bachelorette hotel block cleared - $187 per head
snippet: Hotel block confirmed at Lakeside Suites. Per-head share cleared at $187...
body:
Hi Maria,

Bachelorette weekend hotel block is confirmed at Lakeside Suites. Per-head share cleared at $187.00 (final, post-tax and resort fee). The earlier group-thread quote of $165 was pre-tax only. I'll send a Venmo request for anyone who has not squared up yet.

Rachel

subject: Reservation confirmation: Jason Sandoval MDW-DTW
snippet: Amadeus reservation: Jason Sandoval MDW to DTW. Scheduled arrival 8:47 PM local time...
body: Amadeus reservation confirmation: Jason Sandoval, Chicago Midway (MDW) -> Detroit Metro (DTW). Scheduled arrival: 8:47 PM local time. Please plan airport pickup accordingly. Booking ref: JS-27913. Note: the earlier family thread plan of an afternoon arrival around 4 PM was superseded when Jason rebooked.

subject: Final catering headcount - Nicole & Karim wedding
snippet: Please confirm the final head count so we can lock the plated dinner order...
body:
Hi Maria and Nicole,

We need the final catering head count by end of the week so the kitchen can order plated portions and finalize the dietary flags. Our system currently shows 148 attendees synced from Eventbrite. Please confirm whether that number is authoritative or if Nicole's master list should be used instead.

Thank you,
Lakeside Kitchen events

subject: Bachelorette weekend room block - final invoice
snippet: Cleared per-head charge on the room block: $187 (12 rooms, 2 nights)...
body:
Reservation confirmation for the bachelorette weekend room block. Final per-head cleared charge: $187 per attendee. The earlier estimate of $165 did not include state tax and the resort fee.

Lakeside Suites reservations

subject: Just checking in
snippet: Hey, saw Nicole is doing well. Any weekend plans coming up?...
body:
Hey Maria,

Saw Nicole is doing well from her last post. Any big weekend plans coming up on your end? I have some paperwork I was going to drop off, wanted to make sure I did not hit a bad time.

Mark

subject: Following up
snippet: No rush. Just let me know when a good time is...
body:
No rush, Maria. Just let me know when a good time to drop those documents by would be.

Mark

subject: Wedding photos I found in the attic
snippet: Mija, I found the box of Nicole's high school photos, sending you a few...
body:
Mija, I finally went through the box in the attic. Sending you these photos of Nicole from high school for the toast. Also, are you doing okay with the wedding budget? You know your father and I are here if you need help with anything.

Mom

subject: Chen family portrait - checking in on delivery
snippet: Hi Maria, just checking on the family portrait timeline...
body:
Hi Maria,

I wanted to check in on the family portrait commission. The last update I saw from you said about five weeks from now. Is that still the plan? No rush, just planning for framing.

Grace Chen

subject: Substitute for Saturday class on wedding weekend
snippet: Rachel, can you cover the Arts Center Saturday 2-4 PM class on the wedding weekend?
body:
Rachel,

Would you be able to substitute-teach the Arts Center Saturday 2 to 4 PM class on the wedding weekend? I will have the lesson notes, materials list, and the class board access all packaged for you before I leave.

Maria

subject: Re: Substitute for Saturday class on wedding weekend
snippet: Yes I can cover that Saturday. My travel plans changed...
body:
Yes, absolutely. My travel plans changed and I am in town that weekend. Just send me the packet whenever you have it ready.

Rachel
